summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Gas Kras band website completed successfully. All core features working including multilingual support, responsive design, navigation, and social media integration.

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile menu links had visibility issues during automated testing - may need timing adjustments
ui_bugs.note: Menu opens/closes correctly, likely a test timing issue rather than functionality problem

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section and logo placeholder
All 8 pages accessible via navigation (Home, Music, Videos, About, Gallery, Merch, News, Contact)
Language switcher works correctly for SLO/ITA/ENG
Mobile responsive design with working hamburger menu
Social media links on Contact page are correct and functional
All placeholder images and content slots display properly
CTA buttons navigate to correct pages
No JavaScript errors or broken functionality detected
Clean design with proper fonts (Playfair Display) and color scheme
success_percentage: frontend: 95% - All major functionality working, one minor mobile menu timing issue
